ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Continued To Sep-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Robert T. Roddick appearing via zoom for George Roehm (administrator).

Mr. Roddick stated that he will file a waiver on account, and that he will review the terms on the examiners notes and file before the next hearing. Status on close of estate is continued to September 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by August 29, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.
